name: Asparagus Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 cans Whole green asparagus, 17 oz each
Homemade mayonnaise or Commercial mayonnaise - thinned with Light cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the asparagus and try to keep the spears whole.
2. Place lettuce leaves on 8 salad plates and arrange the asparagus on the lettuce leaves. Alternatively, the asparagus may be placed in a vegetable bowl.
3. Place a spoonful of mayonnaise over the asparagus.
4. Garnish with the hard cooked egg.
5. Chill before serving.
